rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.215, which governs immunity from liability for school personnel administering epinephrine or respiratory distress medication. No overlap exists.
quote: A person who in good faith takes, or fails to take, any action under this subchapter is immune from civil or criminal liability or disciplinary action resulting from that action or failure to act
_note: Rule text concerns school epinephrine/respiratory distress medication immunity; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
